statementText:
SELECT tmp.check_key, tmp.status, tmp.error_message
FROM tenant_monitor_profiles tmp
JOIN msp_customers mc ON mc.tenant_id = tmp.tenant_id
WHERE mc.id = 4 AND tmp.check_key IN (
  'devices:bitlocker-key-escrow', 'devices:encryption-status', 'devices:compliance-policy-coverage',
  'exchange:dkim-spf-dmarc-status', 'exchange:auto-forwarding-rules', 'exchange:mail-flow-rule-review'
)
AND tmp.status = 'error'
ORDER BY tmp.check_key, tmp.collected_at DESC
LIMIT 12;

statementText:
-- Every distinct real error message across all 40 failing checks --
-- confirms whether there are genuinely just 2 root causes or more
SELECT check_key, error_message, COUNT(*)
FROM tenant_monitor_profiles tmp
JOIN msp_customers mc ON mc.tenant_id = tmp.tenant_id
WHERE mc.id = 4 AND tmp.status = 'error'
GROUP BY check_key, error_message
ORDER BY check_key;
